auth.tagline: Connect to your secure OMI space.

dashboard.header_subtitle: Welcome to the management space of {{name}}.

settings.title: School Configuration
settings.subtitle: Manage your digital identity and Google presence.
settings.gmb_subtitle: Improve your local visibility and guide parents.
settings.gmb_info: By linking your Google Place ID, your school will automatically display its reviews, hours, and exact position on your o-229 showcase site.
settings.place_id_help: Unique Google Maps identifier for your establishment.
settings.error_find: No location found for this address.
settings.error_api: Search requires Google API key configuration.
settings.preview_empty: Configure the Place ID to see the map preview.

mobile.title: Multi-Channel Mobile Solution
mobile.subtitle: Distribute your app without the Play Store using QR Codes and PWA technology.
mobile.solution1_subtitle: Display this code in your school for instant download.
mobile.solution2_subtitle: Turn your website into an installable app without APK files. Ideal for iPhone and Android.
mobile.native_desc: Adds to home screen like a real app.
mobile.web_desc: Parents always have the latest version.
mobile.icon_desc: Icons are automatically generated in Square and Adaptive formats for Android 13+.
mobile.protection_desc: All generated apps use HTTPS and our platform's secure authentication. No data is stored on the device unencrypted.

audit.title: Audit Trail
audit.subtitle: Complete traceability of all actions on the platform
audit.info_text: The tracking robot automatically records all creations, modifications, deletions, and logins in real time. They are immutable and non-deletable.

reports_page.title: Reports & Robots
reports_page.subtitle: Reports automatically generated by OMI Robots
reports_page.robots_desc: 3 robots monitor your school: Payment alerts, Report card generation, Attendance tracking. They send downloadable PDF reports at regular intervals.
reports_page.robot_alert: 🤖 The Robot has started report generation! You will be notified when it's ready.
reports_page.robot_demo: 🤖 Report scheduled by the Robot! (Demo mode)

public.find_us_sub: Visit our school or contact us.
public.map_not_available: Map is not yet available for this school.
